name: Crispy Chicken with Parmesan Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 large Chicken Breast Halves (about 1.5 lbs total)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. In a small bowl, mix the bread crumbs, chopped parsley, minced garlic, 2 tablespoons of olive or salad oil, and 1/4 teaspoon of black pepper until well combined.
3. Brush Dijon style mustard onto the skin side of each chicken breast half.
4. Coat each chicken piece with the breadcrumb mixture, pressing firmly to ensure a good coating.
5. Spray an 11 X 7-inch glass or ceramic baking dish with non-stick cooking spray.
6. Place the chicken, skin side up, in the baking dish.
7. Bake the chicken for 20 minutes without turning it.
8. Meanwhile, cut each tomato lengthwise into halves on waxed paper.
9. Mix Parmesan cheese, oregano, salt, and 1/4 teaspoon of black pepper in a bowl until well combined.
10. Sprinkle the cheese mixture over the tomato halves.
11. Add the tomatoes to the baking dish with the chicken and bake for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the coating on the chicken is crispy and browned and juices run clear when pierced with a knife.
12. To Serve: Toss watercress with salad dressing. Arrange tomatoes, chicken, and salad on plates and enjoy.
